title: Sweet Soy Salmon Noodles with Pan-Fried Bell Pepper
description: Heart-healthy salmon in a sweet soy and hoisin marinade tossed with egg noodles, bell pepper, and a kick of sweet chilli.

steps.instruction: Boil salted water and cook noodles 4–6 minutes until softened; drain and toss with a little oil.
Pan-sear salmon skin-side down for 4–5 minutes, then flip and cook 3–4 minutes until opaque.
Slice onion and bell pepper; grate ginger.
Sauté onion and pepper for 4–5 minutes until soft; add ginger and cook 1 minute more.
Flake salmon into the pan; add soy sauce, hoisin, ketchup, a splash of water, and half the sweet chilli sauce.
Toss noodles in the sauce to coat, divide into bowls, and drizzle with remaining sweet chilli sauce.
